label: Molecular Generation
description: Generates optimized drug-like molecules from a seed compound using MolMim (CMA-ES guided latent-space optimization). Outputs novel analogs ranked by score.

defaultInputs.name: Lead Compound
defaultInputs.tooltip: Optional SMILES from an upstream bioactivity filter to use as seed molecule.

defaultOutputs.name: Generated compound
defaultOutputs.tooltip: SMILES string of the generated/optimized molecule.

defaultOutputs.name: Score
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Optimization score (0–1, higher = better alignment with the target property).

configSchema.label: SMILES
configSchema.tooltip: Seed molecule SMILES string. The generation will explore the chemical neighbourhood of this scaffold.

configSchema.label: Algorithm
configSchema.tooltip: Generative algorithm. MolMim uses a masked molecular language model with CMA-ES optimisation in the continuous latent space.

configSchema.label: Number of Molecules
configSchema.tooltip: Total number of molecules to generate.

configSchema.label: Optimization Property
configSchema.tooltip: Molecular property to optimise during latent-space search.

configSchema.label: Minimize Property
configSchema.tooltip: If enabled, the algorithm will minimise the target property (e.g. synthetic accessibility score) rather than maximise it.

configSchema.label: Minimum Similarity
configSchema.tooltip: Minimum Tanimoto similarity to the seed molecule. Lower values allow more diverse but potentially less drug-like outputs.

configSchema.label: CMA-ES Particles
configSchema.tooltip: Population size for the CMA-ES optimisation step. Larger values improve coverage but increase runtime.

configSchema.label: CMA-ES Iterations
configSchema.tooltip: Number of CMA-ES iterations. More iterations give better convergence at the cost of compute time.
